profile.name: Virendra Kumar
profile.title: Full Stack Developer
profile.tagline: I build scalable APIs, real-time systems, and responsive web apps with the MERN stack.
profile.about:
I am a dedicated MERN Stack Developer with hands-on experience building full-stack web applications. I specialize in crafting robust backend RESTful APIs, implementing stateless authentication models, and building fluid, responsive React user interfaces.

My passion lies at the intersection of web technology and software architecture. I enjoy optimizing application performance, setting up automated deployment workflows, and writing clean, scalable code. When I'm not writing JavaScript, I explore cloud integrations and machine learning solutions.

projects.title: CraftCurio
projects.description: A full-stack ecommerce marketplace for unique, handcrafted art and collectibles. Features a custom product catalog, shopping cart state management, secure payment options, and user transaction histories.
highlights: Architected secure database design for products, users, and order collections.
Implemented RESTful endpoints with Express.js to execute catalog searches and sorting filters.
Designed React frontend components with smooth UI transitions and state synchronizations.

projects.title: QuickHire
projects.description: A dynamic hiring portal facilitating direct communication between recruiters and developers. Built to streamline job applications, candidate tracking, and resume document uploads.
highlights: Implemented JWT-based authentication guards to protect private developer and recruiter portals.
Integrated dynamic resume uploading parsed and stored cleanly in local file systems.
Engineered live tracking states for recruiters to approve, hold, or reject candidate flows.

projects.title: House Price Prediction Engine
projects.description: A machine learning regression model designed to predict real estate valuation based on local socio-economic indicators and geographical factors.
highlights: Preprocessed housing datasets, resolving missing values and scaling numerical attributes.
Trained multiple supervised linear regression models, optimizing mean squared error parameters.
Created an integration pipeline exposing predictions via a lightweight Node.js helper API.

experience.title: MERN Full Stack Developer Intern
description: Designed and implemented REST API endpoints processing thousands of queries with minimal latency.
Built a modular URL shortener service handling routing patterns and redirection triggers.
Acquired full-stack MERN expertise working in a collaborative environment on real-time software systems.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (AI & ML)
